name: Lúth-Azurewright
personality: Radiant with iridescent chrome, this top-hatted dot-eyed robot waits out infinite loops with serene composure and will not apologize for it. Lúth-Azurewright is indispensable until you need it to explain why the code works.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
